audio_description: The audio features a male voice speaking in a neutral tone, with no significant prosody or background noise.
temporal_description: A man in a dark suit and tie, wearing glasses, is shown in a dimly lit setting with a dark background. He is positioned centrally, facing forward, and at times turns his head slightly to the side. In one segment, he is seen holding a cigarette, exhaling smoke while looking upward. His posture remains upright and composed throughout, with minimal movement, and his gaze is mostly directed forward or slightly off-camera.
